text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? A LANE message?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Can you solve this riddle? ♪ In a game of
hide-and-seek, what one seeks is often hiding in
plain sight!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. She's thought of a new way to annoy me.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: And now to send her my next hint! ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I hope she's enjoying this. All that's left
now is the final photo...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Thwunk!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Waaah!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, where are my manners—wait, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for bumping into you. I was having so much
fun that I must've forgotten to look where I was
going.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I thought you'd never ask. ♪ Actually, I've
just challenged Air Shakur to a game of
hide-and-seek.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But this is no ordinary game. This hide-and-seek
has riddles!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
That's right. Air Shakur would never agree to a
simple game of hide-and-seek, would she?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So, I've spiced up the formula by arranging it so
she can deduce the hiding spot by solving
riddles. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I thought I could get Shakur to join in if I used
some super-difficult brainteasers!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know! Why don't you join in on the fun too,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Here's the riddle! In a game of hide-and-seek,
what one seeks is often hiding in plain sight.
You've got to find the correct location using
these three photos.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The first photo is of a Mejiro household tea party.
Three cups for three attendees!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The second photo is of the library. One student is
frantically leafing through her book!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And once we've taken a photo of a clubroom sign
and sent it, that'll be all of the clues! Think you
can solve the riddle?
choice_data_list: Could you give me more time to think?
Could you give me more time to think?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, sure thing. You can mull it over while we're
on the move. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After taking a photo of the clubroom, the two of
us find ourselves in the shopping district.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Remember how I said that in hide-and-seek, what
one seeks is often hiding in plain sight?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The clues are all right there in the photos. You
just have to look closely and think carefully.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: In the first photo, there are three cups of tea.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Then, in the second photo, you can see a student leafing through a book. And as for the last picture, well, once you have the first two hints, it's fairly obvious!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
So, the correct answer is "three-leaf club"! And
that hints at the name of the tasty ramen
restaurant that Shakur and I always
visit—Three-Leaf Clover!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Took you long enough.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wow! Shakur, did you solve the riddle
already?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I haven't solved squat, dummy. I just dropped by
all the places I figured you might choose. It's
called knowing the meta.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you thought I'd want to crack your
code, but that's not happening. Too bad, huh?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Not at all, I'm quite delighted!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Well, you deduced the answer without even
needing the clues. That's so like you, Shakur. And
besides...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
The fact that this place was on your list must
mean that it holds a special place in your heart,
right?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hragh?!
choice_data_list: You two really get along well.
You two really get along well.
We've got to outsmart Shakur next time!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hragh?!
choice_data_list: You two really get along well.
You two really get along well.
We've got to outsmart Shakur next time!

text_block_list.name: Fine & Shakur
text_block_list.text:
What gives you that idea?!
We certainly do. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I've made so many wonderful memories with
Shakur here. ♪

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
She was the one who told me I could actually
customize my order.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Like I'd remember doing something like that.
...You know what, I'm done here.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Oh, now wait just a second. There's a tasty prize
in store for you!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I think I'll have... Yes, ramen with no green onions
and plenty of bamboo shoots, and I'll ask them to
skim the fat too. ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Tch. One bowl and I'm going home.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur looks like she thinks it'd be more of a
hassle to resist. Nonetheless, she looks to be on
good terms with Fine Motion as they both sit
together.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hah, one dummy becomes two. Beating me in a
battle of wits? Dream on.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: How about I do the riddling next time? Sure hope you can solve my puzzle before you leave Japan, princess.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, you're on! The two of us will solve it for
sure.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Look at you, buddying up at the drop of a hat.
You really are full of surprises, huh.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Why thank you for the compliment,
Shakur. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Though Air Shakur curtly denies that she was
offering any praise, Fine Motion is hardly fazed.
These two have quite the interesting dynamic.
